'''âj-j-ch''' ('''kajajach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:welter|welter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:welter|welter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajajach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijajach|thijajach]] || [[word:jijajach|jijajach]] || [[word:shijajach|shijajach]] || [[word:kijajach|kijajach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujajach|thuthujajach]] || [[word:jujujajach|jujujajach]] || [[word:shushujajach|shushujajach]] || [[word:kukujajach|kukujajach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujajach|thujajach]] || [[word:jujajach|jujajach]] || [[word:shujajach|shujajach]] || [[word:kujajach|kujajach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujajach|thujajach]] || [[word:jujajach|jujajach]] || [[word:shujajach|shujajach]] || [[word:kujajach|kujajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejajach|thejajach]] || [[word:jejajach|jejajach]] || [[word:shejajach|shejajach]] || [[word:kejajach|kejajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojajach|thothojajach]] || [[word:jojojajach|jojojajach]] || [[word:shoshojajach|shoshojajach]] || [[word:kokojajach|kokojajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojajach|thojajach]] || [[word:jojajach|jojajach]] || [[word:shojajach|shojajach]] || [[word:kojajach|kojajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojajach|thojajach]] || [[word:jojajach|jojajach]] || [[word:shojajach|shojajach]] || [[word:kojajach|kojajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjajach|thĂŠjajach]] || [[word:jĂŠjajach|jĂŠjajach]] || [[word:shĂŠjajach|shĂŠjajach]] || [[word:kĂŠjajach|kĂŠjajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajajach|thathajajach]] || [[word:jajajajach|jajajajach]] || [[word:shashajajach|shashajajach]] || [[word:kakajajach|kakajajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajajach|thajajach]] || [[word:jajajach|jajajach]] || [[word:shajajach|shajajach]] || [[word:kajajach|kajajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajajach|thajajach]] || [[word:jajajach|jajajach]] || [[word:shajajach|shajajach]] || [[word:kajajach|kajajach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajajach|shajajach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajajach|goshajajach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajajach|gokishajajach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajajachnĂŒ|shajajachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajajachnknĂŒ|goshajajachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajachnĂŒ|gokishajajachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajajachshĂ«|shajajachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajajachnkshĂ«|goshajajachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajajachshĂ«|gokishajajachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajachro|shajajachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajachnkro|goshajajachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajachro|gokishajajachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajachmu|shajajachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajachnkmu|goshajajachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajachmu|gokishajajachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajajachsher|shajajachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajajachnksher|goshajajachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajajachsher|gokishajajachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajajachng|shajajachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajajachnkng|goshajajachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajajachng|gokishajajachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajajachya|shajajachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajajachnkya|goshajajachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajajachya|gokishajajachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajajachyam|shajajachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajajachnkyam|goshajajachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajajachyam|gokishajajachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajajachnĂŒshĂ«|shajajachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajajachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajajachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajajachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajajachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajachnĂŒro|shajajachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajachnknĂŒro|goshajajachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajachnĂŒro|gokishajajachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajachnĂŒmu|shajajachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajachnknĂŒmu|goshajajachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajachnĂŒmu|gokishajajachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajajachshĂ«nĂŒ|shajajachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajajachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajajachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajajachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajachshĂ«ro|shajajachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajachnkshĂ«ro|goshajajachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajachshĂ«ro|gokishajajachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajachshĂ«mu|shajajachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajachnkshĂ«mu|goshajajachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajachshĂ«mu|gokishajajachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajajachronĂŒ|shajajachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajajachnkronĂŒ|goshajajachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajachronĂŒ|gokishajajachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajajachroshĂ«|shajajachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajajachnkroshĂ«|goshajajachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajajachroshĂ«|gokishajajachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajachromu|shajajachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajachnkromu|goshajajachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajachromu|gokishajajachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajajachmunĂŒ|shajajachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajajachnkmunĂŒ|goshajajachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajachmunĂŒ|gokishajajachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajajachmushĂ«|shajajachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajajachnkmushĂ«|goshajajachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajajachmushĂ«|gokishajajachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajachmuro|shajajachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajachnkmuro|goshajajachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajachmuro|gokishajajachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
